name: case04_unstructure_job
description: Case 04: Unstructured Excel multi-sheet ingestion with Visual ETL CustomCode
codeGenConfigurationNodes:
{"node-1": {"S3CsvSource": {"AdditionalOptions": {"EnableSamplePath": false, "SamplePath": ""}, "Exclusions": [], "Name": "S3 Source - case04_unstructure (placeholder)", "OptimizePerformance": false, "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": [{"Name": "col0", "Type": "string"}]}], "Paths": ["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case04_unstructure/"], "QuoteChar": "disabled", "Recurse": false, "Separator": "tab", "WithHeader": false}}, "node-2": {"CustomCode": {"Name": "Read Excel Multi-Sheet", "Inputs": ["node-1"], "ClassName": "MyTransform", "Code": "import pandas as pd
import boto3
from io import BytesIO
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType
from awsglue import DynamicFrame
from awsglue.dynamicframe import DynamicFrameCollection

BUCKET = "gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169"
SOURCE_KEY = "preparing/case04_unstructure/case04_unstructure_20260408.xlsx"
SHEETS = ["Personal", "MicroFinance", "NonRetailLoan"]
SKIP_ROWS = 2
COLUMNS = ["LN_TYPE", "GL_ACCOUNT_ID", "CID", "COST_CENTER", "AMOUNT", "RATE_INT", "PROVCAT", "STAGE", "COVERAGE_RATIO", "EAD", "ECL", "PRV_ECL", "UNDRAWN"]

s3 = boto3.client("s3")
response = s3.get_object(Bucket=BUCKET, Key=SOURCE_KEY)
excel_bytes = BytesIO(response["Body"].read())

all_dfs = []
for sheet_name in SHEETS:
    df = pd.read_excel(excel_bytes, sheet_name=sheet_name, header=None, skiprows=SKIP_ROWS, dtype=str, engine="openpyxl")
    df = df.iloc[:, :len(COLUMNS)]
    df.columns = COLUMNS
    df["SHEET_NAME"] = sheet_name
    df = df.dropna(how="all", subset=COLUMNS)
    all_dfs.append(df)
    excel_bytes.seek(0)

combined = pd.concat(all_dfs, ignore_index=True)
combined["VERSION_DATE"] = "2026-04-08"
combined["ETL_UPDATE_DATE"] = pd.Timestamp.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

final_columns = ["VERSION_DATE", "ETL_UPDATE_DATE", "LN_TYPE", "GL_ACCOUNT_ID", "CID", "COST_CENTER", "AMOUNT", "RATE_INT", "PROVCAT", "STAGE", "COVERAGE_RATIO", "EAD", "ECL", "PRV_ECL", "UNDRAWN", "SHEET_NAME"]
combined = combined[final_columns]
combined = combined.fillna("")
combined = combined.astype(str)

schema = StructType([StructField(c, StringType(), True) for c in combined.columns])
spark_df = spark.createDataFrame(combined, schema=schema)

out_dyf = DynamicFrame.fromDF(spark_df, glueContext, "xlsx_output")
return DynamicFrameCollection({"xlsx_output": out_dyf}, glueContext)
", "OutputSchemas": [{"Columns": [{"Name": "VERSION_DATE", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "ETL_UPDATE_DATE", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "LN_TYPE", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "GL_ACCOUNT_ID", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "CID", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "COST_CENTER", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "AMOUNT", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "RATE_INT", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "PROVCAT", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "STAGE", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "COVERAGE_RATIO", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "EAD", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "ECL", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "PRV_ECL", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "UNDRAWN", "Type": "string"}, {"Name": "SHEET_NAME", "Type": "string"}]}]}}, "node-3": {"SelectFromCollection": {"Name": "Select From Collection", "Inputs": ["node-2"], "Index": 0}}, "node-4": {"S3DirectTarget": {"AutoDataQuality": {"IsEnabled": false}, "Compression": "gzip", "Format": "csv", "Inputs": ["node-3"], "Name": "S3 Gzip CSV Target - case04_unstructure", "NumberTargetPartitions": "0", "PartitionKeys": [], "Path": "s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case04_unstructure/load/", "SchemaChangePolicy": {"EnableUpdateCatalog": false}}}}
